message:
test(core): add B09b static audit for detached spawns in vendored boundary (ABC-TL-002)

Add b09b_vendored_boundary_sources_forbid_detached_spawns which
statically scans mux_pool.rs and mux_client.rs to verify zero
occurrences of spawn_detached, ensuring all boundary-facing tasks
retain owned handles for explicit cancellation per ABC-TL-002.

Update the B21 audit report mapping to point ABC-TL-002 at this
new test instead of b13_task_ownership_via_join_handle. Update
section headers from B08-B09 to B08-B09b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
